Home › Lake County › Lady Lake › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Lady Lake

Both halves check out across all 7 of these Lady Lake restaurants: an A on the inspection and high marks from diners. TEXAS ROADHOUSE grades a perfect 100/100.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 94 M
    MISSION BBQ LADY LAKE Other ★ 4.7 (1572) Lady Lake · Lake County GFDF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 T
    TEXAS ROADHOUSE American ★ 4.4 (5648) Lady Lake · Lake County DFKeto +1 more Inspected Nov 2025
  • A 93 R
    RUBY TUESDAY #7163 American ★ 4.3 (2215) Lady Lake · Lake County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 96 C
    CHILI'S GRILL & BAR Mexican ★ 4.2 (2998) Lady Lake · Lake County VegKeto Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 97 P
    PANDA EXPRESS #1222 Chinese ★ 3.8 (1193) Lady Lake · Lake County VegDF +1 more Inspected Sep 2025
  • A 90 W
    WENDYS 2300 Other ★ 3.8 (1057) Lady Lake · Lake County KetoHealthy Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 99 M
    MCDONALD'S #37215 Other ★ 3.6 (2233) Lady Lake · Lake County Inspected Jun 2026
